title: The Raid on Onigashima Begins
description: On pages 13–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #12, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Straw Hat Pirates, Kid, Kaido as The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
scene: The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're outta options! We need to get away!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: We can't be taking damage this early...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If that happens, then we won't stand a chance for when we have to fight Kaido!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: The problem isn't just their numbers, either!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is an Emperor's crew. They've got a lot of heavy hitters...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We gotta force our way through! They know it's us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: You ready for the bass drop... �

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kid! Stop! FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: The Backstaber gets his just desserts!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Raid on Onigashima Begins storyline with 33 dialogue beats. The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
